name: LVM3
first: India's heavy-lift workhorse — first interplanetary lançamento (Chandrayaan-3, 2023)
description: ISRO's three-stage lançamento vehicle (formerly GSLV Mk III): two solid S200 boosters, a liquid L110 core, and the indigenously-developed cryogenic CE-20 upper stage. Lifted Chandrayaan-2 (2019) and Chandrayaan-3 (2023) para lunar trajectories. Human-rated for the upcoming Gaganyaan crewed programme.
